home.title: Hello, I'm Iliya Glazunov
home.description:
I am a passionate Python developer seeking my first professional opportunity. With over 5 years of non-commercial experience, I have gained strong skills in web application development and creating Telegram bots. I am also familiar with blockchain and natural language processing.

My goal is to create user-friendly and effective solutions to help users achieve their goals. I am committed to continuing to learn and develop to stay up-to-date with the latest technologies and industry trends.
home.subtitle: Full-Stack / Mobile Developer & Data Analyst passionate about software engineering, data science, and high-performance solutions.

about.headline: Beyond the Code.
about.p1: I am an adaptable software engineer with a strong foundation in computer science and a passion for data analysis and software development.
about.p2: With multiple years of practical and volunteer experience building systems ranging from Django/PostgreSQL platforms to peer-to-peer visualizers and game engines, I thrive on solving multi-disciplinary challenges.
